title: A cell-penetrating protein designed for bimodal fluorescence and magnetic resonance imaging.
author: Wu Q Cheng Q Yuan S Qian J Zhong K Qian Y Liu Y
content: S-EPMC5506616 PMC5506616 A cell-penetrating protein designed for bimodal fluorescence and magnetic resonance imaging. Multimodal imaging is a highly desirable biomedical application since it can provide complementary information from each imaging modality. We propose a protein engineering-based
